description_long: This is a modern, boxy three-seater sofa upholstered in a brown leather or leather-like material. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be loosely placed rather than attached. The armrests are wide, straight, and extend from the base to the height of the backrest, giving the sofa a monolithic, geometric appearance. The back and sides are fully upholstered in the same brown material, with no visible legs or decorative elements, suggesting a low-profile, block-style base. The surface of the upholstery has a subtle, slightly mottled texture, giving it a natural leather look, and the overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living spaces.
description: A modern, boxy brown leather three-seater sofa with wide straight armrests and three uniform seat and back cushions. The upholstery has a subtle, natural leather texture and the base is fully enclosed.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, wide straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, fully upholstered back with no visible seams or legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth, emphasizing the sofa's blocky profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all loose and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, block-style armrests at full seat and backrest height, fully upholstered in matching material with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully enclosed and upholstered, giving a blocky, grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-height backrest with three loose, uniform cushions; continuous and unsegmented structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown with a subtle, mottled leather texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
